head.description: Explore events, webinars and training from Moonstone. Get practical legal and business insights from our experts and stay ahead of the latest developments.

Training | How to conduct a successful TUPE transfer

In today’s evolving commercial landscape, understanding when TUPE applies and how to manage a transfer effectively is key. This session gives you the clarity and confidence to handle transfers smoothly, lawfully, and with minimal disruption.

Training | Sexual harassment prevention training for management

Practical, focused training that helps your managers understand their responsibilities, handle issues confidently, and take the right steps to prevent sexual harassment and protect your business.

Online or in person

Training | Sexual harassment prevention for employees

We’ll give you clear guidance on your responsibilities under the Equality Act 2010 and what this means in practice for your workplace. The aim is simple. Give your people the confidence to act and help you meet your duty to prevent sexual harassment.
